title: grewia australis
intro: Grewia australis, also known as the Australian Lantana, is a flowering plant native to Australia and is a member of the family Malvaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The leaves of the Grewia australis plant are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of Grewia australis, including teas and extracts, have been used to treat fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, and are also used as a natural remedy for digestive issues.
